title: GinSMP
description: Official Modpack for the Gingerwomann public server
body:
This is the Offical Modrinth page for the GinSMP!

This modpack is not required to play on the GinSMP, but is reccomended as it gives you all the mods you need.

This modpack is lightweight, consisting of simple voice, optimization mods, and a few quality of life mods that will help you out!
